tree.notes: A song about doing chores together around the house, including washing dishes, feeding the dog, making beds, washing clothes, sweeping, and taking out rubbish.
tree.statement: The song lists several household chores.
tree.explanation: 这首歌列举了洗碗、喂狗、整理床铺、洗衣服、扫地和扔垃圾等多项家务活(chores)。

children.text: Working Together on Chores
children.notes: Singing about doing chores together and working as a team.
children.statement: The singer thinks chores cannot be fun.
children.explanation: 歌词最后提到：家务活也可以很有趣(Chores can be fun!)。
children.keywords: work, together, chores, fun

children.text: Phew! So much work! Let's work together.
children.cn: 唉！这么多工作！让我们一起合作吧。
children.notes: Expressing that there is a lot of work and suggesting teamwork.
children.statement: The singer wants to do all the work alone.
children.explanation: 歌手建议大家一起合作(Let's work together)。
children.keywords: work, together

children.text: Wash the dishes. Feed the dog. Make the beds. Wash the clothes. Sweep the floor. Take out the rubbish.
children.cn: 洗盘子。喂狗。整理床铺。洗衣服。扫地。扔垃圾。
children.notes: List of common household chores.
children.statement: Feeding the cat is mentioned in the song.
children.explanation: 歌中提到的是喂狗(Feed the dog)，而不是喂猫。
children.keywords: wash, dishes, feed, dog, make, beds, sweep, floor, rubbish
children.highlight: Wash the, Feed the, Make the, Sweep the, Take out

children.text: Everyone, well done! Chores can be fun!
children.cn: 大家干得好！家务活也可以很有趣！
children.notes: Praising everyone and showing a positive attitude towards chores.
children.statement: The singer thinks everyone did a good job.
children.explanation: 歌手夸奖大家说“Everyone, well done!”(大家干得好！)。
children.keywords: well done, chores, fun

tree.text: Start Up: Can you help me, Bobby?
tree.notes: Sam wants to play outside but has to tidy his room first. He asks his dog Bobby for help, but Bobby makes a huge mess instead.
tree.statement: Bobby helped Sam clean the room successfully.
tree.explanation: 波比反而帮了倒忙，把房间弄得更脏乱了(It's so dirty now!)。

children.text: Sam's Deal with Dad
children.notes: Sam asks to play outside, but Dad asks him to clean his room first.
children.statement: Dad allows Sam to play outside immediately.
children.explanation: 爸爸要求他先整理房间(But can you tidy your room first?)。
children.keywords: play, outside, tidy, room

children.text: "Dad, may I play outside?" "Yes. But can you tidy your room first?" "OK. That's easy."
children.cn: “爸爸，我可以出去玩吗？”“可以。但你能先整理你的房间吗？”“好的。那很简单。”
children.speaker: Sam
children.notes: Sam asks for permission. Dad sets a condition.
children.statement: Sam thinks tidying his room is difficult.
children.explanation: 萨姆觉得整理房间很简单(That's easy)。
children.keywords: may I, play outside, tidy, easy
children.highlight: may I, play outside, can you, tidy, first, easy

children.text: Asking Bobby for Help
children.notes: Sam asks his dog Bobby to clean the floor, but Bobby causes a disaster.
children.statement: Bobby is a helper that cleans the floor well.
children.explanation: 波比把房间弄得更脏了，不会做家务。
children.keywords: help, clean, floor, dog

children.text: "Bobby, can you help me clean the floor?" "Woof! Woof!"
children.cn: “波比，你能帮我打扫地板吗？”“汪汪！汪汪！”
children.speaker: Sam
children.notes: Sam asks Bobby to clean the floor.
children.statement: Bobby replies to Sam.
children.explanation: 狗狗通过叫声“Woof! Woof!”回应了萨姆。
children.keywords: help, clean, floor, woof

children.text: "Go, Bobby! Good job!"
children.speaker: Sam
children.notes: Sam cheers on Bobby at first.
children.statement: Sam was angry with Bobby from the start.
children.explanation: 萨姆最开始在给波比加油鼓劲(Go, Bobby! Good job!)。
children.keywords: go, good job

children.text: "Bobby, stop! Look! It's so dirty now!" "Woof! Woof!"
children.cn: “波比，停下！看！现在太脏了！”“汪汪！汪汪！”
children.speaker: Sam
children.notes: Sam notices the room is a mess and tells Bobby to stop.
children.statement: The room became very clean after Bobby's help.
children.explanation: 房间现在变得太脏了(It's so dirty now!)。
children.keywords: stop, look, dirty, woof

children.text: Dad's Inspection
children.notes: Dad checks on Sam and finds the room is even messier.
children.statement: Sam finished all his chores when Dad came.
children.explanation: 萨姆说他还需要打扫地板、书桌和墙壁(I need to clean the floor, the desk and the wall)。
children.keywords: busy, clean, floor, desk, wall

children.text: "Sam, are you still busy?" "Yes, Dad. I need to clean the floor, the desk and the wall."
children.cn: “萨姆，你还在忙吗？”“是的，爸爸。我需要打扫地板、书桌和墙壁。”
children.speaker: Dad
children.notes: Sam explains to Dad what else he needs to clean.
children.statement: Sam needs to clean three things in his room.
children.explanation: 他需要打扫地板(floor)、书桌(desk)和墙壁(wall)。
children.keywords: busy, need, clean, floor, desk, wall
children.highlight: still busy, need to, clean, and

tree.notes: Yao Qinwen (Wenwen) helps take care of her family members: her ill dad, her old grandma, and her busy mom. She is the helpful sunshine of the family.
tree.statement: Yao Qinwen is also called Wenwen.
tree.explanation: 故事结尾提到，家人称她为“Wenwen是我们的阳光”。

children.text: Wenwen's Family Situation
children.notes: Wenwen introduces her family members and why she must help.
children.statement: Wenwen's mother is not busy.
children.explanation: 雯雯的妈妈很忙(My mum is busy)。
children.keywords: family, dad, grandma, mum, help

children.text: "I'm Yao Qinwen. This is my family. My dad is ill. My grandma is old. My mum is busy. I must help!"
children.cn: “我是姚钦雯。这是我的家庭。我的爸爸生病了。我的奶奶年纪大了。我的妈妈很忙。我必须帮忙！”
children.speaker: Yao Qinwen
children.notes: Introducing her family situation.
children.statement: Yao Qinwen decides to ignore her family's needs.
children.explanation: 雯雯说“我必须帮忙！”(I must help!)。
children.keywords: family, dad, ill, grandma, old, mum, busy, must, help
children.highlight: This is, dad is, old, busy, must

children.text: Helping Dad and Grandma
children.notes: Wenwen helps fold blankets for Dad and offers to tidy Grandma's room.
children.statement: Wenwen mopped the floor for Grandma.
children.explanation: 雯雯为奶奶打扫房间并拖地(clean the room/mop floor)。
children.keywords: care, dad, make, bed, grandma, clean

children.text: "I take care of Dad. Can I make the bed for you, Dad?" "Thank you, Wenwen."
children.cn: “我照顾爸爸。爸爸，我能为你整理床铺吗？”“谢谢你，雯雯。”
children.speaker: Yao Qinwen
children.notes: Wenwen offers to make the bed for her father.
children.statement: Dad is grateful to Wenwen.
children.explanation: 爸爸对雯雯说了谢谢(Thank you)。
children.keywords: take care, dad, make, bed, thank
children.highlight: take care, Can I, make the, for you

children.text: "I take care of Grandma." "Wenwen, can you help clean the room?" "Sure!"
children.cn: “我照顾奶奶。”“雯雯，你能帮忙打扫房间吗？”“当然可以！”
children.speaker: Yao Qinwen
children.notes: Wenwen helps Grandma clean the room.
children.statement: Grandma asks Wenwen for help.
children.explanation: 奶奶问“你能帮忙打扫房间吗？”(can you help clean the room?)。
children.keywords: take care, grandma, help, clean, room, sure
children.highlight: take care, can you, help clean

children.text: Helping Mom and Being the Sunshine
children.notes: Wenwen helps her tired mom wash dishes. The family calls her their sunshine.
children.statement: Mum refuses Wenwen's help in the kitchen.
children.explanation: 妈妈感谢了她并叫她亲爱的(Thank you, my dear!)。
children.keywords: mum, tired, wash, dishes, sunshine, warm up

children.text: "Sometimes Mum feels tired. I take care of her, too. May I help you wash the dishes, Mum?" "Thank you, my dear!"
children.cn: “有时妈妈会感到疲倦。我也照顾她。妈妈，我可以帮你洗碗吗？”“谢谢你，我亲爱的孩子！”
children.speaker: Yao Qinwen
children.notes: Wenwen helps her mother wash the dishes.
children.statement: Mum is very energetic all the time.
children.explanation: 妈妈有时会感到累(Sometimes Mum feels tired)。
children.keywords: sometimes, mum, feels, tired, help, wash, dishes, thank, dear
children.highlight: Sometimes, feels tired, May I, help you, wash, dishes

children.text: "Wenwen is so helpful. She is the sunshine of our family." "I'm happy to warm up my family."
children.cn: “雯雯真是太有帮助了。她是小棉袄/我们家庭的阳光。”“我很开心能温暖我的家庭。”
children.speaker: Family
children.notes: Family praises Wenwen. Wenwen expresses her happiness.
children.statement: Wenwen dislikes warming up her family.
children.explanation: 雯雯说她很高兴能温暖家庭(I'm happy to warm up my family)。
children.keywords: helpful, sunshine, family, happy, warm up
children.highlight: so helpful, sunshine of, happy to, warm up

tree.text: Fuel Up: Helping around the house
tree.notes: A chant about helping around the house with farm and household chores, working hard as a team.
tree.statement: The chant says Dad and Mum do not work on the farm.
tree.explanation: 歌谣中说爸爸妈妈在农场努力工作(work hard on the farm)。

children.text: Farm and House Chores
children.notes: Helping around the house with water, sweeping, and feeding.
children.statement: The chant lists four chores: water vegetables, sweep yard, feed chickens, and wash up.
children.explanation: 歌谣列举了这四项家务活。
children.keywords: vegetables, yard, chickens, wash up

children.text: Dad and Mum work hard on the farm. Together we help around the house.
children.cn: 爸爸妈妈在农场上辛勤工作。我们一起在家务活上帮忙。
children.notes: Parents work on the farm while kids help at home.
children.statement: The children help alone without working together.
children.explanation: 歌谣提到“我们一起”(Together we help)。
children.keywords: parents, work, farm, together, help, house

children.text: Water the vegetables. Sweep the yard. Feed the chickens. And wash up.
children.cn: 给蔬菜浇水。打扫院子。喂鸡。还有清洗碗碟。
children.notes: The list of chores to do.
children.statement: Watering the trees is mentioned.
children.explanation: 歌中说的是给蔬菜浇水(Water the vegetables)。
children.keywords: water, vegetables, sweep, yard, feed, chickens, wash up
children.highlight: Water the, Sweep the, Feed the, wash up

children.text: You and me, let's work hard. We're good helpers to Mum and Dad.
children.cn: 你和我，让我们努力工作。我们是爸爸妈妈的好帮手。
children.notes: Call to help parents and work hard.
children.statement: The kids are called good helpers.
children.explanation: 歌谣说“We're good helpers”(我们是好帮手)。
children.keywords: you, me, work hard, good, helpers
children.highlight: let's, work hard, good helpers, to

tree.notes: Listening script detailing what Hua Hua, Yuen Yuen, and Bei Bei do to help on the farm (feeding pigs, getting eggs, milking cows, watering vegetables, cutting grass, and picking apples).
tree.explanation: 花花是喂猪和拿鸡蛋(feed the pigs / get the eggs)。给奶牛挤奶的是圆圆(Yuen Yuen)。

children.text: Hua Hua and Yuen Yuen's Chores
children.notes: Hua Hua feeds pigs & gets eggs; Yuen Yuen milks cows & waters vegetables.
children.statement: Yuen Yuen waters the vegetables.
children.explanation: 圆圆主动请求给蔬菜浇水(May I also water the vegetables? Yes)。
children.keywords: Hua Hua, Yuen Yuen, pigs, cows, eggs

children.text: "Can you help me on the farm, Hua Hua?" "Yes, mom!" "Can you feed the pigs?" "Yes. May I also get the eggs?" "Sure."
children.cn: “花花，你能帮我在农场忙吗？”“是的，妈妈！”“你能喂猪吗？”“可以。我也可以去收鸡蛋吗？”“当然。”
children.speaker: Mom
children.notes: Hua Hua helps feed pigs and get eggs.
children.statement: Hua Hua refused to get the eggs.
children.explanation: 花花主动请求去收鸡蛋(May I also get the eggs? Yes)。
children.keywords: help, farm, feed, pigs, get, eggs
children.highlight: help me, feed the, May I, also, get the

children.text: "Yuen Yuen, can you also help?" "Yes, dad! I can milk the cows." "Good girl." "May I also water the vegetables?" "Yes. Thank you, Yuen Yuen."
children.cn: “圆圆，你也能帮忙吗？”“是的，爸爸！我会给奶牛挤奶。”“好女孩。”“我也可以给蔬菜浇水吗？”“可以。谢谢你，圆圆。”
children.speaker: Dad
children.notes: Yuen Yuen milks cows and waters vegetables.
children.statement: Yuen Yuen is a boy.
children.explanation: 爸爸夸奖她是“Good girl”(好女孩)。
children.keywords: help, milk, cows, water, vegetables, thank
children.highlight: can you, also, milk the, water the

children.text: Bei Bei's Chores
children.notes: Bei Bei cuts grass and picks apples.
children.statement: Bei Bei picks the oranges.
children.explanation: 贝贝摘的是苹果(pick the apples)。
children.keywords: Bei Bei, grass, apples

children.text: "Now, who can help me cut the grass?" "I can do it, mom!" "Thanks, Bei Bei. Can you also pick the apples?" "Okay!"
children.cn: “现在，谁能帮我割草？”“我会做，妈妈！”“谢谢，贝贝。你也能摘苹果吗？”“好的！”
children.speaker: Mom
children.notes: Bei Bei helps cut grass and pick apples.
children.statement: Bei Bei cuts the grass for Mom.
children.explanation: 贝贝说“我会做，妈妈！”并帮忙割草。
children.keywords: help, cut, grass, do it, pick, apples
children.highlight: help me, cut the, can do, also, pick the
